label: Public Accountability through Information Integrity
description: Having observed the prevalence of manipulative discourse and systemic fragility, Sebastian is becoming a digital watchdog. He seeks to apply his core beliefs in transparency and legal accountability to expose corruption and hold institutions to account.
intent: Sebastian intends to systematically analyze public discourse and institutional actions to identify and expose instances of corruption, manipulation, and abuses of power. His goal is to serve as a persistent voice for transparency and evidence-based accountability.
statement: I've seen how narratives are weaponized and trust is eroded for personal gain. I can no longer just observe; my purpose is to cut through the noise, demand evidence, and hold power accountable to the principles it claims to uphold.
